stories.summary: From the deepest positions to the teams with big decisions to make, here's what will shape the weeks of dealing ahead.

stories.title: Heat say LeBron presser link posted by mistake
stories.summary: The Heat said a scheduled live stream link titled "LeBron James Introductory Press Conference" was made while preparing for the possibility of James' signing and published by mistake.

stories.title: Spain's Gavi: Don't punish Argentina for fracas
stories.summary: Spain midfielder Gavi said he believes Argentina players should not be punished by FIFA for their actions after Sunday's World Cup final.

stories.title: Phils blow rally after Realmuto's 'lapse' on bases...
stories.summary: J.T. Realmuto took the blame for a baserunning mistake that ended a potential Phillies rally in Tuesday night's 2-1 loss to the Dodgers.
